market_pulse: Friday activity shows strong momentum across mid-tier competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) with consistent social engagement; David Guetta + Tiësto bookings signal strong A-list DJ momentum heading into weekend.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: LIV Beach posting strong day-party lineups (David Guetta Sat, DJ Kaila Troy Fri)
Competitor saturation on weekend: OMNIA (Zedd Thurs, De'orro Fri), Zouk (Lil Tunechi Sat)
Competitor audio trending: trap, tech-house, reggaeton remixes gaining TikTok momentum
LIV nightclub inventory stable with proven residents (Dom Dolla, John Summit rotation)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Deploy emerging audio content (Afrobeats remixes, hyperpop mashups) competing brands haven't saturated yet. Focus Saturday bottle service marketing to 25-35 demo on TikTok.

content_gaps.description: Afrobeats + tech-house hybrids gaining viral momentum on competitor posts; LIV content still anchored to classic house.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Commission 3-5 TikToks featuring emerging Afrobeats house mashups from upcoming LIV residents; test with @globeth0tter and micro-influencer collabs.

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes prep/soundcheck content rare across LIV accounts; competitors posting stage setups + DJ gear more frequently.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Add weekly BTS TikTok series: 60-90 sec of DJ soundchecks, bottle prep, headliner arrival moments.

content_gaps.description: Event countdown content (48h, 24h, 6h before doors) under-utilized by LIV; OMNIA, Palm Tree doing this effectively.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Standardize countdown series on Reels/Stories: push notifications at 48h, 24h, 6h with urgency hooks ('Last 50 spots available').

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest LIV Nightclub review + XS Nightclub review (175 likes, 20 comments); positioned as trusted venue authority for Las Vegas nightlife.
Posted OMNIA chandelier content (2.3M likes, 13.4K comments); Hakkasan venue review. High-reach EDM club content producer.
Official MGM account promoting Hakkasan Nightclub with venue tour clips (219 likes); brand authority.
Las Vegas official account featured Palm Tree Beach Club grand opening (1874 likes); high-reach city-level promotion.

story_activity.summary: Posted weekend DJ lineup (David Guetta Sat 4/18, DJ Kaila Troy Fri 4/17, DJ Irvg Sun 4/19) with 'All-new day life oasis' tagline.
Posted 4/17 Zedd performance + 4/18 De'orro/Taog Group partnership, signaling strong weekend DJ rotation.
Posted 4/17 Noizu Sound + 4/18 Lil Tunechi AYU Dayclub; strong crossover promotion between nightclub + dayclub.
Established brand presence with 193.3K TikTok followers; boutique positioning by Kygo x Tao Group Hospitality effective.

venues.summary: Strong resident DJ rotation (John Summit, Dom Dolla, Cloonee, Dombresky, Matroda) with consistent Instagram presence (87K followers, 641 posts). Latest posts showing April 10-12 lineup on 641-post feed.

raw_posts.content_summary: LIV Las Vegas headline post: 'Meet us under the Halo🪩 FRI, April 10- @dombresky SAT, April 11- @cloonee SUN, April 12- @marcostrous'
TikTok reviews from @globeth0tter on guest list experience; backstage access with John Summit mention showing influencer traction.
Guest list promoter Edwin Griffiths (@livlvguestlist) posted Dom Dolla event with promo codes and free entry details; high-engagement promoter content.
Official event calendar showing Matroda (Apr 27), Official BTC 2026 Kickoff with DJ Precise, Ship Wrek and other resident lineups through May.

venues.summary: Daytime counterpart to LIV Nightclub with 38K Instagram followers (441 posts). Posting weekend headliners with strong visual production. April 17-19 lineup shows David Guetta Saturday.

raw_posts.content_summary: LIV Beach weekend lineup: 'FRI, April 17- @djkailatroy SAT, April 18- @davidguetta SUN, April 19- @djirvg Located inside @fontainebleaulasvegas'
User review: 'John Summit at LIV Beach Club' with spring break content showing dayclub appeal to 20-30 demo.
60-second walkthrough by @lydiainvegas showing new dayclub amenities, pool layout, packed weekend crowd expectations.

venues.summary: Major competitor at Wynn Las Vegas (308K Instagram followers, 4,190 posts). High social reach with promotional content and guest list marketing. Strong influencer reviews.

raw_posts.content_summary: XS Las Vegas headline: 'Where every night deserves an Encore 🎶✨ Located inside of @WynnLasVegas' with consistent branding.
Influencer @globeth0tter posted XS Nightclub honest review (175 likes, 20 comments); guest list experience positioning.
Multiple dress code and outfit TikToks appearing in XS discovery feed; user-generated content showing fashion-forward positioning.
Norman Jay Las Vegas Promoter account (@normanjay_lasvegas) with 176K followers; XS/ENCORE promoter content with 1,799 posts showing heavy promotion infrastructure.

venues.summary: Day/night hybrid at Wynn Las Vegas (285K Instagram followers, 3,864 posts). Strong pool and cabana positioning with influencer activity.

raw_posts.content_summary: Encore Beach Club main account: 'Unforgettable days, Unstoppable nights 🍾💫 Located inside @WynnLasVegas'
TikTok content showing upper cabana experience + golden hour pool photography; luxury positioning appeals to high-spenders.
David Guetta appearance mentioned in Encore context; major artist association boosts venue credibility.
Guest list account (@encorebeachclubguestlist) with 4,791 followers; free VIP access promotion via text-based sign-up.

venues.summary: Major Caesars Palace competitor (458K Instagram followers, 3,513 posts). Strong momentum with weekly artist lineup. April 11-18 posts show Zedd (4/17), De'orro (4/18).

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA main account: '#OMNIALasVegas 4/11 @followthefishtv 4/12 #deseolatinsundays 4/14 @djrobguson 4/17 @zedd 4/18 @deorro @taogrouphospitality concept @caesarspalace'

OMNIA official TikTok account (@omnialasvegas) with 323.3K followers; regular event posts and venue highlights.
Multiple dress code and experience review content in OMNIA discovery feed; user-generated social proof.

venues.summary: New dayclub concept by Tao Group (OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar with 247K Instagram followers, 14 posts only). Limited but high-profile artist bookings: Follow the Fish (5/15), Rufus du Sol (5/16), Martin Garrix (5/17).

raw_posts.content_summary: OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar account: '5/15 @followthefishtv 5/16 @rufusdusol (dj set) 5/17 @martingarrix Introducing OMNIA Dayclub & Skybar By @TaoGroupHospitality at @CaesarsPalace'
Main OMNIA account linking to dayclub concept; shared hashtag strategy (#OMNIALasVegas) across night/day properties.
Limited TikTok content but strong brand integration messaging; positioning as luxury, boutique day experience.

venues.summary: Resorts World Las Vegas venue with 249K Instagram followers (Zouk Group account). Strong crossover promotion with AYU Dayclub. Tech-forward positioning with '40,000 sq ft most technologically advanced nightclub' messaging.

raw_posts.content_summary: Zouk Group main account: 'Fri, 4.17 - @noizusound🎧 Sat, 4.18 - @liltunechi🛹 @ayudayclub | @resortsworldlv'
Multiple dress code and guide content in Zouk discovery feed; upscale casual positioning appeals to 25-40 demo.
Official Zouk Las Vegas account (@zouk.lv) with 12K followers; guest list + table reservations focus via direct phone/DM.
Zouk official events page showing upcoming artist rotation; tech-forward production messaging.

venues.summary: MGM Grand anchor (258K Instagram followers, 6,388 posts). Established R&B Wednesday brand with diverse artist programming. Cardi B after-party mention suggests A-list talent draw.

raw_posts.content_summary: Hakkasan Nightclub main account: '@taogrouphospitality concept at @mgmgrand UPCOMING 🪩 4/15 R&Bae Wednesdays 4/16 @twinsick 4/17 @fourcolorzack 4/18 @djpaulyd'

R&Bae Wednesdays promoter content; Cardi B after-party announcement; strong celebrity positioning.

Hakkasan Vegas Facebook presence with 344,905 likes showing legacy club status; multi-platform approach.

venues.summary: Newest MGM Grand dayclub (193.3K TikTok followers, 232K Instagram followers, 114 posts). Boutique positioning by Kygo x Tao Group Hospitality. High-engagement TikTok presence (426.3K total likes).

raw_posts.content_summary: @vegas official account featured Palm Tree Beach Club grand opening announcement with 1874 likes; city-level promotion endorsement.
Palm Tree Beach Club official account (@palmtreebeachclub) with 193.3K followers; 'Vegas' Luxury Daylife Destination' branding and Wednesday-Sunday schedule.
Instagram account (@palmtreebeachclub) with 232K followers; 114 posts showing consistent luxury pool/daylife content.
Featured in Las Vegas Weekly and Forbes as newest dayclub hotspot (May 2025 coverage); MGK + Sydney Sweeney appearance viral moment.

venues.summary: Venetian Resort rooftop dayclub (92K Instagram followers, 460 posts). Established brand with consistent EDM talent rotation. Tiësto April 11th booking signals strong A-list draw.

raw_posts.content_summary: TAO Beach main account (@taobeach) with 92K followers; multi-sensory Asian-inspired tropical oasis positioning.

EDC Week day party announcements (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki); seasonal event positioning.
